subcodes.first_line: We bear witness that there is no God but Him. He hath indeed manifested Him Who was promised in all His Books and adorned the world thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نشهد انه لا اله الا هو قد اظهر من کان موعودا فی کتبه کلها و زین العالم بهذا
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
